section.heading: Encrypted backup
section.description: Create a .phylax file with all profile data. You will need this exact password to restore.

form.password-help: Your master password or any password you choose. Minimum {{min}} characters.

status.downloaded: Backup encrypted with the password you entered. You will need this exact password to import the backup later.

error.password-too-short: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
error.no-profile: No profile available to back up.
error.locked: App is locked. Please unlock and try again.
error.crypto-unavailable: Browser does not support Web Crypto.
